Off Calendar May-28-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Bianca Velez, ESQ. of HANSON BRIDGETT LLP. Tel:(415) 777-3200 for plaintiff.
David Ericksen, ESQ. of Ericksen Legal, PC. Tel: (415) 652-4031 for defendants MERKER ARCHITECTURAL GROUP INC. and MARC DANA MERKER. (Via Zoom videoconference).
Michael Murtaugh, ESQ. of Murtaugh Treglia Stern & Delly LLP. Tel:(949)794-4000. for defendants MERKER ARCHITECTURAL GROUP INC. and MARC DANA MERKER. (Via Zoom videoconference).

Hearing is held. Discussed, not ARGUED. The court adopts its tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT MERKER ARCHITECTURAL GROUP INC., MARC MERKER MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

Before the court is a Motion to be relieved as Counsel from David A. Erickson and Ericksen Legal, PC, counsel for Defendants Marc Dana Merker and Merker Architectural Group, Inc. The request is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.

Current counsel of record for Defendants Marc Dana Merker and Merker Architectural Group, Inc. are David A. Erickson and Murtaugh Treglia Stem & Deily LLP ("The Murtaugh Firm"). Moving Parties failed to timely serve their request to withdraw on The Murtaugh Firm, Such service is necessary. Indeed, if this request were granted, it would authorize David Ericksen's withdrawal, but not The Murtaugh Firm's, who would still be counsel of record. It is apparent from the motion that this is not the intended or desired outcome. The court will not move forward on any request to be relieved as counsel for Defendants absent at the very least, timely notice to the Murtaugh Firm. Moreover, the court will not relieve the Murtaugh Firm absent a proper request from the firm. Notably, too, the current record does not provide a basis to authorize withdraw by the Murtaugh Firm; not currently having a member with knowledge of the case is not grounds, nor is no longer having an interest in representing the parties.

Order Signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
